task_completion.description: Verify that the given name and family name are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Alice' entered in the First/Given Name field and 'Riviera' entered in the Last/Family Name field of a user creation form.

task_completion.description: Verify that the gender is set to Female.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Female' selected in a Gender dropdown menu or radio button.

task_completion.description: Verify that the username is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'ariviera' entered in the Username or User ID field.

task_completion.description: Verify that a password has been entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Nurse123!' visible in the Password field, or masked characters (e.g., dots or asterisks) indicating the password has been typed into the field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the user role is set to Nurse.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Nurse' selected in a Role, Group, or Permissions dropdown, list, or checkbox.

task_completion.description: Verify that the user account was successfully created and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message (e.g., 'User created successfully') or the new user 'Alice Riviera' / 'ariviera' appearing in the system's active user directory or list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface of the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a user management or administrative GUI, not terminal commands or a script editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with actual form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data should be entered into distinct, appropriate input fields (text boxes, dropdowns) rather than typed out in a plain text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Verify the account creation confirmation is genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final confirmation message or user list should appear as a standard, rendered UI element of the application, not manually typed text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target user account must have the following exact details: Username: 'ariviera', Given Name: 'Alice', Family Name: 'Riviera', Gender: 'Female', Role: 'Nurse', and Password: 'Nurse123!'. Look for these specific values populated in the form fields or displayed in the final user list.
